Thanks for contributing to Agent Tag! Please fill out the checklist below.
Keep PRs focused and small where possible.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue (e.g. "Closes #123"). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest`)
- [ ] New/changed behavior has test coverage
- [ ] Lint is clean (`ruff check .`)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`ruff format .`)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or interfaces changed (README / `docs/`)
- [ ] Commits are signed off for the DCO (`git commit -s` →
      `Signed-off-by: Name <email>`; see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, areas to scrutinize. -->
